commands.author: TurboTheTurtle
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0a4a020cb32f64246b85b150a192cb3b38098cc2)
commands.review_summary:
The branch derives a single exact `agent:<id>` Usage query, sends it to `sessions.usage`, seeds Usage agent filter options from `agents.list`, reloads when the applied agent scope changes, and adds a legacy-gateway fallback for `agentId` rejection.

PR surface: Source +84, Tests +196. Total +280 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main sends no `agentId` from `loadUsage`, while the gateway defaults omitted `sessions.usage.agentId` to the default agent. I did not run a live multi-agent browser reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs author or maintainer revision for the cost-scope defect plus real behavior proof; no ClawSweeper repair marker is appropriate while contributor-side proof remains missing.

target.title: fix(agents): strip stale invalid Anthropic thinking
target.author: turbotheturtle
